choices.text: PMP (Project Management Professional, general), CCM (Certified Construction Manager, CMAA), LEED AP (green building), OSHA 30 (safety supervisor), State GC license (run business), AC (AIC Associate Constructor). Differentiate + boost salary.

questions.explanation: PMP + CCM + LEED + OSHA + GC license.

choices.text: Infrastructure (US bipartisan bill funded $1T+), data centers (AI-driven boom), healthcare, EV manufacturing, renewable energy, housing (chronic shortage). Plus ConTech specialist roles (BIM, Procore, drones, robotics). Salary $60-300k+.
